layout_rule: Top-level map_assets folder names are preserved. No asset files are included. Each top-level folder contains JSON files only; nested manifest folders were flattened.
json_limit_rule: Each top-level subfolder under map_assets contains no more than 5 JSON manifest files.

asset_root_candidates.note: Use D:\map_assets only when it mirrors C:\Users\Public\Pictures\map_assets.

covered_source_folders_exact: City Walls Assets - Complete Set/No Shadow
Ships & Sailing Assets 1 - Complete Set/Premade Ships
Tavern Assets - Complete Set/Wall Parts (No Shadows)

deduplication.method: Exact duplicate logical asset paths were merged. Same content in different folders was not removed because folder paths must stay intact; those are counted as content duplicate groups.
